About Us

Shivamogga's Trusted Painting Supervision Expert

Welcome to Nandi Painters. I am Jagadish B P, a professional painting supervisor based in Shivamogga (Shimoga), Karnataka with over 30 years of hands-on experience in house and building painting supervision.

I ensure that every painting project — whether it's a new home, apartment complex, or commercial building — is executed to the highest standards. From selecting the right paints to monitoring contractor work and inspecting the final finish, I manage everything so you don't have to worry.

My expertise spans interior and exterior painting, surface preparation, waterproofing, texture finishes, and complete paint brand consultancy including Asian Paints, Berger, Dulux, and Nerolac.

🎨 Paint Expert Deep knowledge of paints, brands & finishes
👷 Contractor Management Supervise & coordinate painting contractors
🔍 Quality Inspection Rigorous multi-stage quality checks
📍 Local Expert Deep knowledge of Shivamogga conditions
Our Services

Comprehensive Painting Supervision

Professional supervision across all painting needs — from single rooms to entire apartment complexes in Shivamogga.

🏠

House Painting Supervision

End-to-end supervision for residential painting projects. We ensure proper preparation, quality paint application, and flawless finishing for your dream home.

🛋️

Interior Painting Supervision

Supervision of all interior surfaces — walls, ceilings, woodwork, and trims. Smooth putty, proper priming, and premium finish coats for stunning interiors.

🌦️

Exterior Painting Supervision

Weather-resistant exterior painting supervision. We recommend UV-resistant, waterproof paints suited to Shivamogga's climate for long-lasting protection.

🏢

Apartment & Building Supervision

Large-scale supervision for multi-floor apartments and commercial buildings. Coordinating multiple teams with uniform quality and on-schedule delivery.

🔍

Paint Quality Inspection

Detailed inspection at every stage — surface prep, primer, base coat, and top coat. We catch defects early to prevent costly rework.

👷

Contractor Coordination

Managing painting contractors on your behalf — ensuring they follow proper techniques, use specified materials, and deliver on time and budget.

🎨

Paint Selection Guidance

Expert advice on paint brands, shades, and finishes. We recommend from Asian Paints, Berger, Dulux, Nerolac, and Indigo based on your needs.

💧

Waterproofing Supervision

Supervision of waterproofing for terraces, bathrooms, and exterior walls — preventing seepage and damp problems before they damage your property.

Why Choose Us

The Nandi Painters Difference

Professional supervision that protects your investment and guarantees quality results.

01

Experienced Supervision

30+ years of painting supervision in Shivamogga — we've seen every challenge and know how to handle them.

02

Best paint brands and grades for each surface — preventing substandard materials that lead to peeling and fading.

05

Time-Efficient Projects

Proactive coordination keeps painting projects on schedule — your home ready on time, without delays.

06

Local Shivamogga Expertise

Deep understanding of Shivamogga's weather, humidity, and local contractor ecosystem for the best solutions.
